mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `match` (tournament_id, sport_type, group_stage_id, `name`, team1_id, team2_id, team1_score, team2_score, aggregate_score, extra_time_score, penalty_score, winner_id, set_score, total_sets, status, stage, match_time, location) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{sportType}, #{groupStageId}, #{name}, #{team1Id}, #{team2Id}, #{team1Score}, #{team2Score}, #{aggregateScore}, #{extraTimeScore}, #{penaltyScore}, #{winnerId}, #{setScore}, #{totalSets}, #{status}, #{stage}, #{matchTime}, #{location})

INSERT INTO `match` (tournament_id, sport_type, group_stage_id, `name`, team1_id, team2_id, team1_score, team2_score, aggregate_score, extra_time_score, penalty_score, winner_id, set_score, total_sets, status, stage, match_time, location) VALUES
(#{match.tournamentId}, #{match.sportType}, #{match.groupStageId}, #{match.name}, #{match.team1Id}, #{match.team2Id}, #{match.team1Score}, #{match.team2Score}, #{match.aggregateScore}, #{match.extraTimeScore}, #{match.penaltyScore}, #{match.winnerId}, #{match.setScore}, #{match.totalSets}, #{match.status}, #{match.stage}, #{match.matchTime}, #{match.location})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE team1_id = #{teamId} OR team2_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE group_stage_id = #{groupStageId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC

SELECT match_id AS matchId, match_name AS matchName, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, match_time AS matchTime, location, team1, team1_score AS team1Score, team1_goals AS team1Goals, team1_goals_against AS team1GoalsAgainst, team1_yellow AS team1Yellow, team1_red AS team1Red, team1_fouls AS team1Fouls, team1_subs AS team1Subs, team2, team2_score AS team2Score, team2_goals AS team2Goals, team2_goals_against AS team2GoalsAgainst, team2_yellow AS team2Yellow, team2_red AS team2Red, team2_fouls AS team2Fouls, team2_subs AS team2Subs, status, stage, stage_name AS stageName, total_goals AS totalGoals, total_yellow_cards AS totalYellowCards, total_red_cards AS totalRedCards, total_fouls AS totalFouls, total_substitutions AS totalSubstitutions FROM v_match_stats_overview WHERE match_id = #{matchId}
